experiment: Platform Extension Effort / Zero Agent Modification Property

comparison.description: Agent directly integrates each platform using platform-specific SDKs/APIs
comparison.agent_code_changes_required: High — new tool calls, new response parsers, new auth flow per platform
comparison.response_parser_changes_required: New parser required for each platform
comparison.notes: Agent must learn platform-specific API, auth, schema, and pagination per platform

comparison.description: New adapter class implementing LakehouseAdapter ABC + config registration
comparison.agent_code_changes_required: None — agent uses same 5 MCP tools with same canonical response
comparison.notes: Only 4 files change: new adapter, config model, registry entry, config YAML

zero_agent_modification_property.evidence: SnowflakeAdapter stub implements LakehouseAdapter; server/tools.py, canonical models, and policy engine unchanged
